violations.details: SSH module missing: mktree, health, ls, completions, test. Current recipes lack [group()] attributes
violations.recommendation: Implement standard recipe set with proper group annotations

violations.details: Recipes build, install, clean, template, test, list-targets lack [group()] attributes
ADR-003 states .meta.json is deprecated for new modules. File exists but marked 'TODO'
Line 5: dotssh uses env('XDG_CONFIG_HOME') instead of config_directory()
ADR-002 requires: set shell := ["bash", "-euo", "pipefail", "-c"]. lib.just uses zsh instead
violations.recommendation: Add explicit shell settings or document override reason

violations.details: No data.yml file. Should document config, dependencies, target-dir following ADR-005 schema
violations.recommendation: Create data.yml with deps, target-dir, and other schema fields

violations.details: Custom op item list | jq | mustache pattern deviates from: mustache data.yml | envsubst | op inject
violations.recommendation: Implement ADR-004 pipeline or document deviations in README

violations.violation: op:// references mixed with Mustache templating
violations.details: engagement-config.mustache contains op:// refs with Mustache variables: op://{{vault}}/{{uuid}}/...
violations.recommendation: Separate Mustache templating from op inject per ADR-004 & ADR-006

violations.details: Missing: README.md, data.yml, brewfile. Dependencies undocumented (1Password, mustache, lsd, jq)

adr_002_justfile_conventions.notes: Missing standard recipes, no group annotations, XDG anti-pattern, shell settings

adr_003_justfile_module_definition.notes: Leaf module (no child justfiles) but has deprecated .meta.json and incomplete structure

adr_004_configuration_templating_pipelin.notes: Custom op querying pattern instead of standard mustache|envsubst|op inject pipeline

adr_005_data_yaml_schema_specification.notes: No data.yml file; module configuration not documented in queryable schema

adr_006_secret_management_with_1password.notes: Uses 1Password but mixes op:// URIs with Mustache templating, unclear pipeline

adr_007_service_module_conventions.notes: SSH is not a service module (no background process/daemon), so ADR-007 does not apply

priority_1_critical: Implement ADR-004 templating pipeline or document deviations (ADR-004)
priority_2_high: Replace XDG env vars with config_directory() (ADR-002)
priority_3_medium: Fix op:// Mustache mixing in templates (ADR-006)
